scripts.build: npm run clean && elm make src/Main.elm --optimize --output=dist/app.js && npm run assets
scripts.assets: cp public/index.html public/app.css dist/ && cp node_modules/material-components-web-elm/dist/material-components-web-elm.min.css node_modules/material-components-web-elm/dist/material-components-web-elm.min.js dist/vendor/
